main.description: An operation-log batch (unified vocabulary Batch). rkey = BatchId (UUID). A batch is one user operation = the undo/redo unit; its ops are the sync/merge resolution units. clock/timestamp/ops are stored losslessly so the record mirrors the canonical operation-log model (step1 Phase 4c / W3d5).

fileId.description: The file this batch belongs to (UUID). Required: the batch collection is repo-wide, so a receiving device cannot otherwise recover which file to apply the batch to — file-structure batches carry no sheetId either (Phase 4d §3.1).

actor.description: Lamport actor. Either the author DID or the reserved 'genesis' actor. NOTE: genesis-actor batches are never pushed to remote (W3d5 §3.5).

clock.description: Lamport logical clock of this batch.

timestamp.description: Wall-clock milliseconds since epoch (tiebreak / createdAt source).

ops.description: Serialized Op[] describing the atomic operations in this batch. Presentation ops (node.setStyle / edge.setStyle / edge.setLabelOffset) are filtered out before remote push (W3d5 §3.2).

sheetId.description: Optional. The originating sheet of a content batch (mirrors Batch.sheetId). Absent for file-structure batches (sheet.*/file.*) and for legacy records predating W3d5.
